typography.h1_classes: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#F8FAFC]
typography.h2_classes: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-normal tracking-tight text-[#F8FAFC]

surfaces.card: bg-[#0F172A] border border-[#1E293B] hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors duration-300
surfaces.button_primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#050814] font-medium hover:bg-[#F3E5AB] transition-all px-6 py-2 rounded-md

images.description: A sophisticated abstract texture in blue and gold
Detailed view of an ankh symbol
Multiracial group of college students studying together indoors
A collection of vintage books displayed on wooden shelves in a library setting
Man working late at a dimly lit office desk

components.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Deep background (#050814). Active link highlighted with gold text and a subtle left border. Inactive links muted blue-gray.
components.dashboard_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. High density, 1px solid borders for separation.
components.courses_cards: Image at the top, dark card body (#0F172A), gold accent for progress bar. Minimal padding.
components.forum_list: Flat list items with bottom borders. Avatars on the left. Unread status uses a gold dot.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over midnight blue has at least 4.5:1 contrast. Use pure white or off-white for body text. Use gold strictly for large text, icons, or prominent accents.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a premium, heritage-focused educational SaaS. Avoid 'fintech-bro' tech aesthetics.
Use strictly custom Shadcn UI with the provided colors. No default Vercel/Stripe styles.
For the login page, use the abstract blue and gold image with an overlay (`bg-[#050814]/70`).
Replace generic icons with Phosphor Icons (duotone weight) to enhance the luxurious feel.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Outfit' for body text. Do not use Inter or generic sans-serif for headings.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
The sidebar navigation must always be visible on desktop. Only use a hamburger menu for mobile.
Avoid muddy drop shadows. Define components with 1px borders (`border-[#1E293B]`).
